message:
feat(codegen): Add comptime module alias system for stdlib imports

Implements a centralized module alias system that maps Python import
names to their Zig implementation names at compile time:

- module_aliases.zig: Central mapping (e.g., _io -> _pyio, _datetime -> _pydatetime)
- stub_modules: Test-only modules that don't need implementations
- ERROR messages for unhandled CPython builtins (forces manual handling)

Also adds import_helper stubs for test.support compatibility:
- import_module(), import_fresh_module(), can_import(), etc.

This is a long-term reusable solution that handles all mirrored files,
not just specific tests. When new upstream files are added, they either:
1. Match directly (same name) -> stdlib_gen handles automatically
2. Differ in name -> add mapping to module_aliases.zig
3. Test-only -> add to stub_modules
